misc: Has planted his seeds in four different women in four different decades.
biography: Mikko, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a wealth of experience to the competition, representing Lakeside Golf Vammala with pride. A competitor in 11 past Hector Trophée tournaments, Mikko is known for his strategic play and calm demeanor under pressure.

Beyond the golf course, Mikko is a man of diverse experiences, having cultivated connections with different women across four decades. This worldly perspective adds a unique dimension to his game, allowing him to approach challenges with a blend of wisdom and adaptability.

Though the Hector Trophée title has eluded him, his consistent presence and dedication to the sport make him a respected figure among his peers. While Mikko is not currently slated to compete in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his passion for golf suggests that we may see him on the course again in the future.
